findings.title: Validator optional-field symbol needed live confirmation
findings.disposition: rg confirmed expectedStateEnumRegistryOptionalFields is defined in scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs and syntax validation passes.

findings.title: Closeout evidence was not present in the review diff
findings.disposition: Evidence files are now recorded under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p01-m07-s09 and final validation is rerun after materialization.

findings.title: Omitted versus null matter_id asymmetry under Matter context
findings.disposition: validateControlPlaneStateEnumRegistryOptionalFields now rejects missing matter_id when a Matter trace context is supplied, and tests plus RP00 validation cover the negative case.

findings.title: status hardcoded production_ready in source constant
findings.disposition: The source constant status matches established closeout policy and the contract/model status consistency check.

findings.title: Cross-subphase test coupling on global nextSubphase
findings.disposition: The existing global nextSubphase assertion pattern is retained for S09; any test factoring belongs to a later dedicated test-maintenance slice.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S09 optional-field-registry slice with no P0/P1, no S10/S11 overreach, and no new enum value definition. Two P2 verification items were resolved by live validator confirmation and closeout evidence materialization.
